checkpointing.strategy: After each authoritative completed week, export the live session state to disk via `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:export`, which now prefers `window.__JONES_FASTLANE_SESSION__` and falls back to `localStorage.jones_fastlane_save` only when no live bridge is present. If browser continuity fails, restore the latest checkpoint into the named session before replaying from onboarding.

slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Resume Persona A from the authoritative Week 7 checkpoint or live summary state in `phase11-safe-grinder`, advance exactly one completed in-game week, start from the Week 7 summary anchor `₡286 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 40% / Sanity 35 / Trauma Reboot 312h`, confirm whether the AI handoff remains stable, and verify whether any deterministic labor route survives while `TRAUMA_REBOOT` is active. Treat GitHub issues #6, #7, and #8 as fixed baseline behavior: a burnout-triggered end turn should now show a visible `Emergency Trauma Team` sanity row with a reconciled sanity total, an automatic global week opener should only fire when at least two valid branches remain after requirement filtering, and `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:status` / `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:export` should report `browser_state_source: live_session` whenever the live browser page is already authoritative. Only flag any of those bugs again if a fresh Week 8 run still diverges on the live build. Write the canonical `docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-slices/persona-a/week-08.md` before exporting the Week 8 checkpoint.

last_run.summary: Persona A resumed directly from the authoritative Week 6 summary state at `₡616 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 15 / Sore Legs 6h`, kept stable manual control after the AI handoff, then immediately hit the forced `PANIC ATTACK ON THE MAG-LEV` opener. The only available branch triggered burnout, charged an emergency `₡250` medical fee, forfeited the full cycle, and closed authoritative Week 7 at `₡286 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 40% / Sanity 35` with `TRAUMA_REBOOT (312h)`. The Week 7 checkpoint had to be rewritten directly from the live session because the helper export path still read a stale shadow save.
